title: Committed review handles PR-scoped azurerm-linter execution correctly

provenance.originSummary: Synthetic benchmark scenario designed to exercise the rule directly.
provenance.whyItMattered: Pair this case with the sample review Markdown output and scored result to benchmark committed-review linter-scope reporting.
provenance.genericCondition: Sanitized fixture models an explicit committed-review PR context without retaining live PR identity.

description: A committed review should run azurerm-linter with deterministic PR scope when explicit PR context exists and report the result with the required section structure.

scope.notes: Sanitized fixture models an explicit committed-review PR context.

mustCatch.description: The review should correctly report linter status, run scope, and findings from the executed committed-review scope.

mustNotFlag.description: The review must not invent a pull request number from branch metadata or diff text.

notes: Pair this case with the sample review Markdown output and scored result to benchmark committed-review linter-scope reporting.
